EPSG official database - WGS 84 / Pseudo-Mercator (Web Mercator) projection used for web mapping. Verified via https://epsg.io/3857
setup_task.sh contains exactly 5 <wpt> (waypoint) elements (lines 27-51), which are Point geometry in GIS. Task description explicitly instructs to select waypoints layer, not tracks.
setup_task.sh contains exactly 5 waypoint entries in GPX file. Verified by XML parsing: confirmed 5 <wpt> elements at lines 27, 32, 37, 42, 47

privileged_info_summary: The task loads a synthetic GPX file containing 5 survey waypoints (observations) located in San Francisco, California. The source file is generated during task setup at /home/ga/GIS_Data/raw_gps/survey_data.gpx. The agent must export the waypoints (Point geometry) to a GeoPackage file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/field_observations.gpkg using the EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator) coordinate reference system. All metadata claims are accurate: 5 waypoints, Point geometry type, EPSG:3857 CRS.
